title: GTA 6: Everything Rockstar Announced and Confirmed on Preorder Day
description: It’s been a big day of GTA 6 news, with Rockstar confirming fresh details for what is perhaps the most anticipated video game of all time ahead of preorders going live. IGN has plenty of coverage for you to dig into, but here we’ve rounded up everything announced and confirmed, including new screenshots, first details on the editions, and even a new (very short) in-game video.

title: GTA 6 Is a 'Single-Player Experience,' Rockstar Confirms — What Now for GTA Online?
description: GTA 6 is a “single-player experience,” Rockstar has confirmed in a note sent to IGN, as well as on storefronts where you can now preorder the game. This suggests the $80 base game does not include any new version of GTA Online, should such an experience be in the works.
